steps.title: Spot the scope expansion
steps.content: The underlined portion appears at the end of a discussion about why solving the glass eel mystery matters. It extends the rationale beyond conservation of the eels themselves to include a benefit to other species that depend on them as food.

steps.title: Match the expanded purpose
steps.content: Choice B directly captures this expansion by stating the benefit “extends beyond the eels”—which is exactly what the underlined portion establishes through its mention of sustaining other species. The other choices either misrepresent the priority between eels and other species, incorrectly describe the type of relationship between them, or shift focus to aspects not addressed in the underlined portion. That matches choice B — B is correct.
